arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Transit Gateway Connect Peer.

bgp_asn.description: The Border Gateway Protocol (BGP) Autonomous System Number (ASN) associated with the peer.

bgp_peer_address.description: The BGP peer address used for establishing the BGP session.

bgp_transit_gateway_addresses.description: The addresses of the transit gateway used for the BGP session.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Transit Gateway Connect Peer.

inside_cidr_blocks.description: The list of inside CIDR blocks for the Connect Peer.

peer_address.description: The IP address of the Connect Peer.

tags.description: The tags assigned to the Transit Gateway Connect Peer.

transit_gateway_address.description: The IP address of the transit gateway for the Connect Peer.

transit_gateway_attachment_id.description: The ID of the attachment for the transit gateway.

transit_gateway_connect_peer_id.description: The ID of the Transit Gateway Connect Peer.
